title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Goibibo Hotels

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Goibibo Hotels
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Hotel Manager with drive and ambition, Goibibo Hotels in Jabalpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Goibibo Hotels:
Goibibo Hotels is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Front Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Goibibo Hotels!
